Avg Order Revenue = AVERAGEX ( VALUES ( Sales[OrderNumber] ), CALCULATE ( SUMX ( Sales, Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitPrice] ) ) )
Avg Quantity Per Order = AVERAGEX ( VALUES ( Sales[OrderNumber] ), CALCULATE ( SUM ( Sales[Quantity] ) ) )
Avg Gross Profit Per Line = AVERAGEX ( Sales, ( Sales[UnitPrice] - Sales[UnitCost] ) * Sales[Quantity] )
Max Order Revenue = MAXX ( VALUES ( Sales[OrderNumber] ), CALCULATE ( SUMX ( Sales, Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitPrice] ) ) )
Max Gross Profit Per Order = MAXX ( VALUES ( Sales[OrderNumber] ), CALCULATE ( SUMX ( Sales, ( Sales[UnitPrice] - Sales[UnitCost] ) * Sales[Quantity] ) ) )
Min Revenue Per Order = MINX ( VALUES ( Sales[OrderNumber] ), CALCULATE ( SUMX ( Sales, Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitPrice] ) ) )

Min Order Cost = MINX ( VALUES ( Sales[OrderNumber] ), CALCULATE ( SUMX ( Sales, Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitCost] ) ) )
Total Revenue Loss Lines = SUMX ( FILTER ( Sales, Sales[UnitPrice] < Sales[UnitCost] ), Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitPrice] )
Total Cost Loss Lines = SUMX ( FILTER ( Sales, Sales[UnitPrice] < Sales[UnitCost] ), Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitCost] )
Total Revenue Discounted Lines = SUMX ( FILTER ( Sales, Sales[DiscountPct] > 0 ), Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitPrice] )
Total Units Discounted Lines = SUMX ( FILTER ( Sales, Sales[DiscountPct] > 0 ), Sales[Quantity] )
Total Revenue Large Orders = SUMX ( FILTER ( VALUES ( Sales[OrderNumber] ), CALCULATE ( SUM ( Sales[Quantity] ) ) > 100 ), CALCULATE ( SUMX ( Sales, Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitPrice] ) ) )

Avg Margin Pct Per Line = AVERAGEX ( Sales, DIVIDE ( Sales[UnitPrice] - Sales[UnitCost], Sales[UnitPrice] ) )
Total Revenue Premium Products = SUMX ( FILTER ( Sales, RELATED ( Product[UnitPrice] ) > 500 ), Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitPrice] )
Total Revenue Category A = SUMX ( FILTER ( Sales, RELATED ( Product[Category] ) = "A" ), Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitPrice] )
Avg Discount Pct Per Order = AVERAGEX ( VALUES ( Sales[OrderNumber] ), CALCULATE ( AVERAGEX ( Sales, Sales[DiscountPct] ) ) )

Max Discount Pct Per Order = MAXX ( VALUES ( Sales[OrderNumber] ), CALCULATE ( MAX ( Sales[DiscountPct] ) ) )
Total Revenue Single Line Orders = SUMX ( FILTER ( VALUES ( Sales[OrderNumber] ), CALCULATE ( COUNTROWS ( Sales ) ) = 1 ), CALCULATE ( SUMX ( Sales, Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitPrice] ) ) )
Avg Cost Per Customer = AVERAGEX ( VALUES ( Customer[CustomerKey] ), CALCULATE ( SUMX ( Sales, Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitCost] ) ) )

Total Margin High Volume Customers = SUMX ( FILTER ( VALUES ( Customer[CustomerKey] ), CALCULATE ( SUM ( Sales[Quantity] ) ) > 500 ), CALCULATE ( SUMX ( Sales, ( Sales[UnitPrice] - Sales[UnitCost] ) * Sales[Quantity] ) ) )
Max Margin Per Product = MAXX ( VALUES ( Product[ProductKey] ), CALCULATE ( SUMX ( Sales, ( Sales[UnitPrice] - Sales[UnitCost] ) * Sales[Quantity] ) ) )

Total Revenue Top Customers = SUMX ( TOPN ( 10, VALUES ( Customer[CustomerKey] ), CALCULATE ( SUMX ( Sales, Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitPrice] ) ), DESC ), CALCULATE ( SUMX ( Sales, Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitPrice] ) ) )
Total Extended Price With Tax = SUMX ( Sales, Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitPrice] * ( 1 + Sales[TaxRate] ) )
Avg Extended Cost Per Product = AVERAGEX ( VALUES ( Product[ProductKey] ), CALCULATE ( SUMX ( Sales, Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitCost] ) ) )
Total Revenue Negative Discount = SUMX ( FILTER ( Sales, Sales[DiscountPct] < 0 ), Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitPrice] )
Count Customers With Multiple Orders = COUNTX ( VALUES ( Customer[CustomerKey] ), IF ( CALCULATE ( DISTINCTCOUNT ( Sales[OrderNumber] ) ) > 1, 1, BLANK () ) )

Total Revenue New Customers = SUMX ( FILTER ( VALUES ( Customer[CustomerKey] ), CALCULATE ( MIN ( 'Date'[Year] ) ) = MAX ( 'Date'[Year] ) ), CALCULATE ( SUMX ( Sales, Sales[Quantity] * Sales[UnitPrice] ) ) )
Avg Order Size By Region = AVERAGEX ( VALUES ( Geography[Region] ), CALCULATE ( AVERAGEX ( VALUES ( Sales[OrderNumber] ), CALCULATE ( SUM ( Sales[Quantity] ) ) ) ) )
